title: Planning State Work Items
goal: Migrate planning state from todo/roadmap candidate buckets to maturity-based work_items and active execplan references.
non_goals: Do not preserve duplicate roadmap.candidates as authoritative state.
Do not remove old-shape compatibility parsing in this slice.
Do not implement promotion/closeout transition helpers beyond preserving current commands.

intent.outcome: Current and default state use [active].execplans plus work_items as the authoritative shape while summary/reconcile still work.
intent.constraints: Keep the package repo-/agent-/tool-agnostic and avoid long-lived duplicate authority.
intent.latitude: Keep old-shape parsing as compatibility input where tests need it.
intent.escalation: Stop before broad checker rewrite or generated compatibility views.

execution.next_step: Continue the parent planning-state-maturity lane through #501 when selected.
execution.proof: planning package tests, ruff, planning doctor, summary

invariants: work_items owns lanes and non-active slices.
Old shapes remain readable compatibility input, not preferred output.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Planning state supports progressive refinement and multi-agent handoff through explicit maturity, roles, promotion, and closeout state.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Planning state can now use top-level work_items for lanes and ready slices plus [active].execplans for active execution authority, while legacy todo/roadmap shapes remain readable compatibility input.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: TOML table ordering matters: top-level work_items must be emitted before [active]. Promotion from structured work_items must preserve typed values instead of stringifying TODO fields.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Current/default state shape, summary projections, promotion, archive cleanup, planning-surface checks, root CLI tests, and lint passed.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: None for #500; #501 remains as the next parent-lane slice.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Implement #500 state.toml migration to maturity-based work items.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Make the compact planning state itself match the maturity model.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add new-shape parser/writer/default support and migrate current state.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Reject duplicate authoritative todo/roadmap candidate state.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning package state parser/writer/defaults/tests and active planning files
execution_bounds.required validation commands: cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any broad checker or manifest rewrite.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: generated CLI, agent aid lifecycle, full compatibility view generation

stop_conditions.stop when: #500 acceptance is met with current/default state migrated and tests passing.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The next change requires broad checker or adapter rewrite.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Summary or current v1 state reports warnings.

context_budget.live working set: #500 issue body, state parser/writer/defaults, promotion/archive cleanup
context_budget.pre-work config pull: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --changed <paths> --format json
context_budget.context-shift triggers: subagent map shows broader compatibility risk.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Migrate planning state to maturity-based work_items and active execplan references.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No duplicate authoritative roadmap.candidates or todo buckets in current/default state.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Migration requires broad checker or generated adapter redesign.

immediate_next_action: Archive this execplan, close #500, then continue #501 when selected.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Default bootstrap state uses the new shape.
Summary/reconcile continue to work on the new shape.
Migration/refusal behavior is tested through new-shape parser/writer coverage.
roadmap.candidates is not authoritative state in current/default shape.

execution_run.what happened: Migrated current and default planning state to work_items plus [active].execplans; taught summary, maturity projection, queue projection, promotion, archive cleanup, and planning-surface checks to read the new shape while keeping old-shape compatibility input.
execution_run.scope touched: planning package parser/writer/defaults/tests, planning-surface checkers, current state, and this execplan.
execution_run.validations run: Focused planning tests; focused workspace CLI tests; workspace summary tests; planning-surface checker; package summary and doctor; targeted ruff; full planning package tests; full planning package ruff; proof selection; full workspace CLI tests; root ruff src tests.
execution_run.result for continuation: #500 is complete; #501 remains routed under planning-state-maturity.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; changes stayed inside planning package state handling, checkers, tests, and planning surfaces.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; authoritative current/default planning state no longer uses todo/roadmap candidate buckets, and compact package outputs read the new maturity shape.
finished_run_review.config compliance: respected repo and local config by using compact summary, checked-in active planning, and bounded package/planning surfaces before implementation
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low after proof; compatibility parsing remains input-only, not preferred output.

proof_report.validation proof: All selected planning package, planning surface, workspace CLI, and lint commands passed.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 149 planning package tests passed; 206 workspace CLI tests passed; summary and doctor returned clean planning state; planning surface checker and ruff checks passed.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Migrate state.toml from todo/roadmap candidates to maturity-based work items.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Current state.toml uses top-level work_items and [active].execplans; default bootstrap state writes the same shape; summaries, promotion, and cleanup have new-shape tests.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make planning state compact, explicit, and queryable without duplicate authority.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Migrate authoritative state shape, keep compatibility as input only.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can summary and promotion work from work_items without raw bucket inference?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #500 is satisfied, but the parent #496 lane still contains #501 transition-helper work.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml work_items lane planning-state-maturity should now suggest #501 after #500 closure.
closure_check.reopen trigger: current/default state reintroduces authoritative todo/roadmap candidates

durable_residue.learned constraint: Compatibility parsing is acceptable; duplicate authoritative state is not.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The state file should itself express maturity rather than requiring bucket inference.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Planning state migrated to explicit maturity-based work_items and active execplan references.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Planning package tests, workspace CLI tests, summary, doctor, proof selection, planning-surface check, and ruff all passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Closeout records TOML ordering and typed promotion implications.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No separate Memory or docs promotion needed; the behavior is enforced by code and tests.

continuation.summary: Planning-state maturity continues through #501 after state migration.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted #500 from planning-state-maturity roadmap lane into an active execplan.
